institution: ICFO — The Institute of Photonic Sciences
heroHeadlineSoft: on the timescales where it actually happens.
heroSub: How does energy flow through matter as it changes state? We answer that in quantum materials and molecules, developing the ultrafast and attosecond light our questions demand.
recordCitation: F. Ardana-Lamas, S. L. Cousin, J. Lignieres, J. Biegert, “Brilliant source of 19.2 attosecond soft X-ray pulses below the atomic unit of time.” Ultrafast Science 10, 34133 (2025).
